user.title: Set up Solar Savings
user.description: Choose the sensors used to calculate cumulative solar savings. Energy sensors should be kWh counters. Price sensors should expose the current import or export price per kWh in your configured currency.

error.duplicate_entity: Each selected sensor must be unique.
error.entity_not_found: One or more selected entities could not be found.

abort.already_configured: These energy meters are already configured.
